## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
Paste any relevant logs from the APPLICATION LOGS panel here.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- GetBhavCopy version: [e.g. v1.0.9]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Installation method: [exe / mac app / source]
